-- in --
package test

templ hello() {
	<div style="margin:0;padding:0;">
		<div style="display:flex;">
			<span style="color:red;"></span>
		</div>
	</div>
}

-- out --
package test

templ hello() {
	<div style="margin: 0; padding: 0">
		<div style="display: flex">
			<span style="color: red"></span>
		</div>
	</div>
}
